_comment: AWS ECS/Fargate task definition for Suture. Register with: aws ecs register-task-definition --cli-input-json file://deploy/ecs-fargate-taskdef.json . Health checks are done at the ALB target group (HTTP GET /health on port 8787) because the distroless image has no shell for a container-level healthCheck. Place behind an ALB with response buffering disabled so SSE streams through. Replace ACCOUNT/REGION.
